description: Verso: Legal note in Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: ca. 1156/57 CE, based on the date of the document on recto. Begins, "Thus claimed Abū l-Faraj Amīn al-Dawla against Abū ʿAlī al-Levi: he heard from his maternal uncle that Abū l-Karam said to him that he sold the codex. . . for 15 dinars. . . ." There follows a description of a dispute over the nature of the sale or loan (as one party maintains that it was).
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
